CustomField.formula: IF( TODAY() - Booking_Invoice_Date__c <= 7, "First Week", IF( TODAY() - Booking_Invoice_Date__c <= 14, "Second Week", IF( TODAY() - Booking_Invoice_Date__c <= 21, "Third Week", IF( TODAY() - Booking_Invoice_Date__c <= 28, "Fourth Week", "Beyond Fourth Week" ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Reminder Week
